description: Patch impact analysis results for a fictional MAS 9.0.3 → 9.1.0 upgrade scenario
patch_reference: IBM MAS Manage 9.1.0 (FICTIONAL — not a real patch)

impacted_items.title: WO Start Validation Script — API signature change
impacted_items.description: The WOSTART_ENERGY_ISOLATION script uses the MboRemote.getString() method which has a deprecated signature in 9.1.0. The script must be updated before patch application.
impacted_items.remediation: Update script to use new getValue() method. Estimated effort: 4h.

impacted_items.title: GIS Sync Script — REST client library replaced
impacted_items.description: The ASSET_GIS_SYNC script uses the internal Maximo HTTP client class which is replaced in 9.1.0 with a new external library. Script must be rewritten.
impacted_items.remediation: Rewrite script using new approved HTTP client. Estimated effort: 8h.

impacted_items.title: MAXIMO-GIS OSLC Integration — endpoint path change
impacted_items.description: The GIS OSLC integration endpoint path changes in 9.1.0. Integration configuration must be updated.
impacted_items.remediation: Update integration endpoint URL in Integration Designer. Estimated effort: 1h.

impacted_items.title: SCADA→Maximo Alarm Feed — message format update
impacted_items.description: The SCADA alarm work request feed uses a message format that is revised in 9.1.0. Queue configuration update required.
impacted_items.remediation: Update message mapping in Integration Framework. Estimated effort: 3h.

impacted_items.title: AMI Head-end Meter Import — batch size limit change
impacted_items.description: The meter reading import integration has a reduced batch size limit in 9.1.0 to improve stability. The current batch size of 5000 must be reduced to 2000.
impacted_items.remediation: Update batch size configuration. Estimated effort: 0.5h.

impacted_items.title: Energy Safety Checklist Screen — tab order reset
impacted_items.description: Screen customisations on the WO Start tab may have their tab order reset during the 9.1.0 upgrade. Post-upgrade visual review required.
impacted_items.remediation: Post-upgrade screen review and re-ordering if needed. Estimated effort: 1h.

impacted_items.title: SCADA WO Generate Cron — scheduler class update
impacted_items.description: The cron task uses a scheduler class that is renamed in 9.1.0. Cron task registration must be refreshed.
impacted_items.remediation: Re-register cron task after upgrade. Estimated effort: 0.5h.
